title: gastrochilus alatus
intro: Gastrochilus alatus, also known as the Indian orchid or Himalayan orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The extracts of Gastrochilus alatus have been traditionally used to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties, offering several health benefits including improved immune function and reduced oxidative stress. Gastrochilus alatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
